backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a workshop POS system, managing shop settings, products, services, transactions, and customers with blob storage support for logo uploads.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (settings, catalog, cashier, receipt, transactions, reports) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to one-line summaries describing each file's role in the Kasir Bengkel POS application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS with OKLCH design token variables for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Kasir Bengkel' that mounts the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (Cashier, Catalog, Transactions, Reports, Settings), a persistent sidebar layout, dark theme, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Print-friendly receipt component using forwardRef that displays shop logo, name, address, phone, transaction details, itemized list, total, and a thank-you message.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Dark sidebar navigation component with brand logo, icon-labeled links for all five pages, active state highlighting, and a caffeine.ai attribution footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating shop settings, products, services, and transactions via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties, and adds print styles for receipt rendering.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, Indonesian Rupiah formatting, date/time formatting, and converting dates to nanosecond bigints.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx: Cashier POS page that manages a shopping cart with products and services, handles checkout with customer/vehicle info, and triggers receipt printing.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Catalog management page with tabbed views for products and services, supporting add, edit, delete, and stock update operations via dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page with three tabs: daily sales summary (revenue + transaction count filtered by date), monthly sales summary (filtered by month), and top-selling items list, using React Query hooks and Rupiah formatting.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Shop settings page allowing the owner to upload a logo (with upload progress) and edit shop name, address, phone number, and thank-you message, persisting changes to the backend via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: Transaction history page that lists all past transactions with search and date-range filtering, supports viewing transaction details in a dialog, reprinting receipts via window.print(), and deleting transactions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (brand, sidebar, chart, etc.), custom fonts (Inter, Roboto Condensed), border radius variables, box shadows, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a web-based workshop cashier app with features including shop settings, catalog management, cashier/transactions, receipt printing via window.print(), transaction history, stock management, and daily/monthly reports, using internal storage without an external database.
